name: Glimpse Group, Inc.
summary: The Glimpse Group, Inc. is an immersive technology company providing enterprise-focused Virtual Reality (VR), Augmented Reality (AR), and Spatial Computing software and services. Operating through subsidiaries including Brightline Interactive (Spatial Core platform), Sector 5 Digital, Glimpse Learning, and Glimpse Lenses, the company targets B2B and B2B2C segments across verticals including Corporate Training, Education, Healthcare, Government & Defense, Branding/Marketing, Retail, and Media & Entertainment. Headquartered in New York, it is hardware agnostic and focuses on AI- and cloud-driven immersive solutions.

products.name: Spatial Core
products.description: Spatial computing, AI, and cloud-driven immersive technology platform primarily targeting DoD and large enterprise, developed by Brightline Interactive.

products.name: Sector 5 Digital (S5D) Solutions
products.description: Corporate immersive technology experiences and events.

products.name: Glimpse Learning Solutions
products.description: Immersive technology and AI solutions for education, healthcare, and training.

products.name: Glimpse Lenses
products.description: Life-like 3D modeling and Augmented Reality lens creation.

partnerships.description: Sales agent for at-the-market offering of up to $3,081,340 of common stock under ATM Facility entered July 11, 2025.
